remaining_params.SpellDescription: For each opponent, choose up to one target creature that player controls. CARDNAME deals X damage to each of those creatures. You create a Mutagen token for each creature dealt damage this way. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature an opponent controls
